     1→<!DOCTYPE html>
     2→<html>
     3→<head>
     4→  <meta charset="utf-8">
     5→  <title>Bundled Page</title>
     6→  <style>
     7→    * { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; }
     8→    body { background: #F6F4EF; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; min-height: 100vh; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, sans-serif; }
     9→    #__bundler_loading { position: fixed; bottom: 20px; right: 20px; font: 13px/1.4 -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, sans-serif; color: #666; background: #fff; padding: 8px 14px; border-radius: 8px; box-shadow: 0 1px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.12); z-index: 10000; }
    10→    #__bundler_thumbnail { position: fixed; inset: 0; width: 100%; height: 100%; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; background: #F6F4EF; z-index: 9999; }
    11→    #__bundler_thumbnail svg { width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: contain; }
    12→    #__bundler_placeholder { color: #999; font-size: 14px; }
    13→  </style>
    14→  <noscript>
    15→    <style>#__bundler_loading { display: none; }</style>
    16→    <div style="position:fixed;bottom:12px;left:12px;font:13px/1.4 -apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,sans-serif;color:#999;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.9);padding:6px 12px;border-radius:6px;box-shadow:0 1px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.08);z-index:10000;">
    17→      This page requires JavaScript to display.
    18→    </div>
    19→  </noscript>
    20→</head>
    21→<body>
    22→  <div id="__bundler_thumbnail">
    23→  <svg viewBox="0 0 1200 800" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
    24→    <rect width="1200" height="800" fill="#F6F4EF"></rect>
    25→    <rect x="60" y="60" width="140" height="140" rx="28" fill="#0D9488"></rect>
    26→    <text x="90" y="155" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-weight="800" font-size="64" fill="#ffffff">NW</text>
    27→    <rect x="240" y="90" width="360" height="34" rx="8" fill="#171412"></rect>
    28→    <rect x="60" y="260" width="1080" height="140" rx="20" fill="#ffffff" stroke="#E7E3DC" stroke-width="4"></rect>
    29→    <rect x="60" y="430" width="520" height="300" rx="20" fill="#ffffff" stroke="#E7E3DC" stroke-width="4"></rect>
    30→    <rect x="620" y="430" width="520" height="300" rx="20" fill="#ffffff" stroke="#E7E3DC" stroke-width="4"></rect>
    31→  </svg>
    32→</div>
    33→  <div id="__bundler_loading">Unpacking...</div>
    34→
    35→  <script>
    36→    
    37→document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', async function() {
    38→  const loading = document.getElementById('__bundler_loading');
    39→  function setStatus(msg) { if (loading) loading.textContent = msg; }
    40→
    41→  const FONT_MIME = /^(font[/]|application[/](x-)?font-|application[/]vnd\.ms-fontobject)/i;
    42→  const MIME_TOKEN = /^[\w.+-]+[/][\w.+-]+$/;
    43→  function toBase64(bytes) {
    44→    let bin = '';
    45→    for (let i = 0; i < bytes.length; i += 0x8000) {
    46→      bin += String.fromCharCode.apply(null, bytes.subarray(i, i + 0x8000));
    47→    }
    48→    return btoa(bin);
    49→  }
    50→
    51→  // Error sink persists across replaceWith since it's on window, not the DOM.
    52→  window.addEventListener('error', function(e) {
    53→    var p = document.body || document.documentElement;
    54→    var d = document.getElementById('__bundler_err') || p.appendChild(document.createElement('div'));
    55→    d.id = '__bundler_err';
    56→    d.style.cssText = 'position:fixed;bottom:12px;left:12px;right:12px;font:12px/1.4 ui-monospace,monospace;background:#2a1215;color:#ff8a80;padding:10px 14px;border-radius:8px;border:1px solid #5c2b2e;z-index:99999;white-space:pre-wrap;max-height:40vh;overflow:auto';
    57→    d.textContent = (d.textContent ? d.textContent + String.fromCharCode(10) : '') +
    58→      '[bundle] ' + (e.message || e.type) +
    59→      (e.filename ? ' (' + e.filename.slice(0, 60) + ':' + e.lineno + ')' : '');
    60→  }, true);
    61→
    62→  try {
    63→    const manifestEl = document.querySelector('script[type="__bundler/manifest"]');
    64→    const templateEl = document.querySelector('script[type="__bundler/template"]');
    65→    if (!manifestEl || !templateEl) {
    66→      setStatus('Error: missing bundle data');
    67→      console.error('[bundler] Missing script tags — manifestEl:', !!manifestEl, 'templateEl:', !!templateEl);
    68→      return;
    69→    }
    70→
    71→    const manifest = JSON.parse(manifestEl.textContent);
    72→    let template = JSON.parse(templateEl.textContent);
    73→
    74→    const uuids = Object.keys(manifest);
    75→    setStatus('Unpacking ' + uuids.length + ' assets...');
    76→
    77→    const blobUrls = {};
    78→    const resourceBlobs = {};
    79→    await Promise.all(uuids.map(async (uuid) => {
    80→      const entry = manifest[uuid];
    81→      try {
    82→        const binaryStr = atob(entry.data);
    83→        const bytes = new Uint8Array(binaryStr.length);
    84→        for (let i = 0; i < binaryStr.length; i++) bytes[i] = binaryStr.charCodeAt(i);
    85→
    86→        let finalBytes = bytes;
    87→        if (entry.compressed) {
    88→          if (typeof DecompressionStream !== 'undefined') {
    89→            const ds = new DecompressionStream('gzip');
    90→            const writer = ds.writable.getWriter();
    91→            const reader = ds.readable.getReader();
    92→            writer.write(bytes);
    93→            writer.close();
    94→            const chunks = [];
    95→            let totalLen = 0;
    96→            while (true) {
    97→              const { done, value } = await reader.read();
    98→              if (done) break;
    99→              chunks.push(value);
   100→              totalLen += value.length;
   101→            }
   102→            finalBytes = new Uint8Array(totalLen);
   103→            let offset = 0;
   104→            for (const chunk of chunks) { finalBytes.set(chunk, offset); offset += chunk.length; }
   105→          } else {
   106→            console.warn('DecompressionStream not available, asset ' + uuid + ' may not render');
   107→          }
   108→        }
   109→
   110→        if (FONT_MIME.test(entry.mime) && MIME_TOKEN.test(entry.mime)) {
   111→          // Strict artifact hosts allow font-src data: but not blob:.
   112→          blobUrls[uuid] = 'data:' + entry.mime + ';base64,' +
   113→            (entry.compressed ? toBase64(finalBytes) : entry.data);
   114→        } else {
   115→          const blob = new Blob([finalBytes], { type: entry.mime });
   116→          blobUrls[uuid] = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
   117→          resourceBlobs[blobUrls[uuid]] = blob;
   118→        }
   119→      } catch (err) {
   120→        console.error('Failed to decode asset ' + uuid + ':', err);
   121→        const blob = new Blob([], { type: entry.mime });
   122→        blobUrls[uuid] = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
   123→        resourceBlobs[blobUrls[uuid]] = blob;
   124→      }
   125→    }));
   126→
   127→    const extResEl = document.querySelector('script[type="__bundler/ext_resources"]');
   128→    const extResources = extResEl ? JSON.parse(extResEl.textContent) : [];
   129→    const resourceMap = {};
   130→    for (const entry of extResources) {
   131→      if (blobUrls[entry.uuid]) resourceMap[entry.id] = blobUrls[entry.uuid];
   132→    }
   133→
   134→    // Artifact-host CSP (connect-src 'self') refuses fetch() of blob: URLs —
   135→    // consumers read these Blobs directly. Survives the swap like the error sink.
   136→    window.__resourceBlobs = resourceBlobs;
   137→
   138→    setStatus('Rendering...');
   139→    for (const uuid of uuids) template = template.split(uuid).join(blobUrls[uuid]);
   140→
   141→    // Strip integrity + crossorigin — blob URLs from a file:// document inherit
   142→    // a null origin, so crossorigin forces a CORS fetch that SRI then rejects.
   143→    // The manifest bytes are ours; SRI protects against CDN compromise, not this.
   144→    template = template.replace(/\s+integrity="[^"]*"/gi, '').replace(/\s+crossorigin="[^"]*"/gi, '');
   145→
   146→    const resourceScript = '<script>window.__resources = ' +
   147→      JSON.stringify(resourceMap).split('</' + 'script>').join('<\\/' + 'script>') +
   148→      ';</' + 'script>';
   149→    // Inject after <head> so the DOCTYPE stays first; prepending the script
   150→    // would push the parser into quirks mode. DOMParser always emits a <head>
   151→    // (synthesizing one if the source HTML omitted it) but may carry
   152→    // attributes through, so match the full opening tag. slice() rather than
   153→    // replace() keeps us clear of $-pattern substitution in resourceScript.
   154→    const headOpen = template.match(/<head[^>]*>/i);
   155→    if (headOpen) {
   156→      const i = headOpen.index + headOpen[0].length;
   157→      template = template.slice(0, i) + resourceScript + template.slice(i);
   158→    }
   159→
   160→    // Parse the template and swap the root element. Scripts inserted via
   161→    // DOMParser/replaceWith are inert per spec — re-create each with
   162→    // createElement so they execute, awaiting onload for src scripts to
   163→    // preserve ordering (React before ReactDOM before Babel before text/babel).
   164→    const doc = new DOMParser().parseFromString(template, 'text/html');
   165→    document.documentElement.replaceWith(doc.documentElement);
   166→    const dead = Array.from(document.scripts);
   167→    for (const old of dead) {
   168→      const s = document.createElement('script');
   169→      for (const a of old.attributes) s.setAttribute(a.name, a.value);
   170→      s.textContent = old.textContent;
   171→      // text/babel scripts with a src: read and inline. transformScriptTags
   172→      // does XHR against the src, but blob:null/ from a file:// origin is
   173→      // silently dropped. Inlining makes it a plain inline babel script,
   174→      // which transformScriptTags handles unconditionally.
   175→      if ((s.type === 'text/babel' || s.type === 'text/jsx') && s.src) {
   176→        const pre = resourceBlobs[s.src.split('#')[0]];
   177→        s.textContent = pre ? await pre.text() : await (await fetch(s.src)).text();
   178→        s.removeAttribute('src');
   179→      }
   180→      const p = s.src ? new Promise(function(r) { s.onload = s.onerror = r; }) : null;
   181→      old.replaceWith(s);
   182→      if (p) await p;
   183→    }
   184→    // Babel standalone auto-transforms type=text/babel on DOMContentLoaded,
   185→    // which fired before we swapped the document. Trigger manually if present.
   186→    if (window.Babel && typeof window.Babel.transformScriptTags === 'function') {
   187→      window.Babel.transformScriptTags();
   188→    }
   189→  } catch (err) {
   190→    setStatus('Error unpacking: ' + err.message);
   191→    console.error('Bundle unpack error:', err);
   192→  }
   193→});
   194→
   195→  </script>

box-sizing: border-box; }\n  body { margin: 0; background: #F6F4EF; font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif; color: #1C1917; -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased; }\n  h1, h2, h3, .nw-heading { font-family: 'Manrope', system-ui, sans-serif; }\n  a { color: #0D9488; text-decoration: none; }\n  a:hover { color: #0F766E; text-decoration: underline; }\n  ::-webkit-scrollbar { width: 8px; height: 8px; }\n  ::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb { background: #D6D3CE; border-radius: 4px; }\n  @keyframes nwSpin { from { transform: rotate(0deg); } to { transform: rotate(360deg); } }\n  @keyframes nwFadeUp { from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(8px); } to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); } }\n  @keyframes nwPulse { 0%, 100% { opacity: 1; } 50% { opacity: .45; } }\n<\u002Fstyle>\n<\u002Fhelmet>\n\n<div style=\"min-height: 100vh; width: 100%; background: #F6F4EF;\">\n\n  <sc-if value=\"{{ showOnboarding }}\" hint-placeholder-val=\"{{ false }}\">\n    <div style=\"min-height: 100vh; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; padding: 24px;\">\n      <div style=\"width: 100%; max-width: 620px;\">\n\n        <div style=\"display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; justify-content: center; margin-bottom: 28px;\">\n          <div style=\"width: 36px; height: 36px; border-radius: 10px; background: #0D9488; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; color: #fff; font-weight: 800; font-family: Manrope, sans-serif;\">NW<\u002Fdiv>\n          <div style=\"font-family: Manrope, sans-serif; font-weight: 800; font-size: 18px; letter-spacing: -0.02em;\">The Next Whiz<\u002Fdiv>\n        <\u002Fdiv>\n\n        <!-- STEP: BRAND -->\n        <sc-if value=\"{{ stepIsBrand }}\">\n          <div style=\"background: #fff; border: 1px solid #E7E3DC; border-radius: 20px; padding: 36px; animation: nwFadeUp .35s ease;\">\n            <div style=\"font-size: 13px; font-weight: 700; color: #0D9488; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: .06em; margin-bottom: 6px;\">Langkah 1 dari 3<\u002Fdiv>\n            <h1 style=\"font-size: 26px; font-weight: 800; margin: 0 0 6px; letter-spacing: -0.02em;\">Selamat datang! Yuk setup brand kamu<\u002Fh1>\n            <p style=\"font-size: 14px; color: #78716C; margin: 0 0 28px; line-height: 1.5;\">Semua fitur Next Whiz — riset, konten, toko, keuangan — jalan berdasarkan brand ini.<\u002Fp>\n\n            <label style=\"display: block; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600; margin-bottom: 6px;\">Nama Brand *<\u002Flabel>\n            <input value=\"{{ brandForm.name }}\" oninput=\"{{ onBrandNameChange }}\" placeholder=\"Keripik Mbak Ani\" style=\"width: 100%; padding: 12px 14px; border: 1.5px solid #E7E3DC; border-radius: 10px; font-size: 15px; margin-bottom: 6px; outline: none;\">\n            <div style=\"font-size: 12px; color: #A8A29E; margin-bottom: 18px;\">URL toko online: tokoku.nextwhiz.id/<span style=\"color: #0D9488; font-weight: 600;\">{{ brandSlugPreview }}<\u002Fspan><\u002Fdiv>\n\n            <label style=\"display: block; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600; margin-bottom: 6px;\">Deskripsi Singkat<\u002Flabel>\n            <textarea value=\"{{ brandForm.description }}\" oninput=\"{{ onBrandDescChange }}\" placeholder=\"Camilan keripik pedas rumahan, level 1-5\" style=\"width: 100%; padding: 12px 14px; border: 1.5px solid #E7E3DC; border-radius: 10px; font-size: 14px; margin-bottom: 18px; min-height: 64px; font-family: inherit; outline: none; resize: vertical;\"><\u002Ftextarea>\n\n            <label style=\"display: block; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600; margin-bottom: 8px;\">Kategori Usaha *<\u002Flabel>\n            <div style=\"display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 8px; margin-bottom: 28px;\">\n              <sc-for list=\"{{ categoryOptions }}\" as=\"cat\" hint-placeholder-count=\"6\">\n                <div onclick=\"{{ cat.onSelect }}\" style=\"{{ cat.style }}\">{{ cat.label }}<\u002Fdiv>\n              <\u002Fsc-for>\n            <\u002Fdiv>\n\n            <button onclick=\"{{ submitBrand }}\" disabled=\"{{ brandSubmitDisabled }}\" style=\"{{ brandSubmitStyle }}\">Simpan &amp; Lanjut →<\u002Fbutton>\n          <\u002Fdiv>\n        <\u002Fsc-if>\n\n        <!-- STEP: PRODUCT -->\n        <sc-if value=\"{{ stepIsProduct }}\">\n          <div style=\"background: #fff; border: 1px solid #E7E3DC; border-radius: 20px; padding: 36px; animation: nwFadeUp .35s ease;\">\n            <div style=\"font-size: 13px; font-weight: 700; color: #0D9488; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: .06em; margin-bottom: 6px;\">Langkah 2 dari 3<\u002Fdiv>\n            <h1 style=\"font-size: 24px; font-weight: 800; margin: 0 0 6px; letter-spacing: -0.02em;\">Tambah produk {{ brand.name }}<\u002Fh1>\n            <p style=\"font-size: 14px; color: #78716C; margin: 0 0 22px;\">Opsional, tapi disarankan — biar Riset &amp; Konten bisa langsung personalisasi.<\u002Fp>\n\n            <sc-if value=\"{{ hasProducts }}\">\n              <div style=\"display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 8px; margin-bottom: 20px;\">\n                <sc-for list=\"{{ productRows }}\" as=\"p\" hint-placeholder-count=\"1\">\n                  <div style=\"display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; padding: 12px 14px; background: #F6F4EF; border-radius: 10px; border: 1px solid #EDEAE3;\">\n                    <div style=\"display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px;\">\n                      <div style=\"{{ p.badgeStyle }}\">{{ p.badgeLabel }}<\u002Fdiv>\n                      <div>\n                        <div style=\"font-weight: 600; font-size: 14px;\">{{ p.name }}<\u002Fdiv>\n                        <div style=\"font-size: 12px; border: 1px solid #E7E3DC; border-radius: 16px; padding: 24px; max-width: 520px;\">\n              <div style=\"font-weight: 700; font-size: 15px; margin-bottom: 16px;\">📄 Laba Rugi — Bulan Ini<\u002Fdiv>\n              <div style=\"display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 1px;\">\n                <sc-for list=\"{{ pnlRows }}\" as=\"row\" hint-placeholder-count=\"5\">\n                  <div style=\"display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; padding: 11px 4px; {{ row.borderStyle }}\">\n                    <span style=\"{{ row.labelStyle }}\">{{ row.label }}<\u002Fspan>\n                    <span style=\"{{ row.valueStyle }}\">{{ row.value }}<\u002Fspan>\n                  <\u002Fdiv>\n                <\u002Fsc-for>\n              <\u002Fdiv>\n            <\u002Fdiv>\n          <\u002Fsc-if>\n\n          <!-- TAB: PAJAK -->\n          <sc-if value=\"{{ keuTabIsPajak }}\">\n            <div style=\"display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); gap: 12px; max-width: 640px; margin-bottom: 16px;\">\n              <div style=\"background: #fff; border: 1px solid #E7E3DC; border-radius: 14px; padding: 18px;\">\n                <div style=\"font-size: 12px; color: #A8A29E; font-weight: 600; text-transform: uppercase; margin-bottom: 8px;\">Estimasi PPh Final UMKM (0.5%)<\u002Fdiv>\n                <div style=\"font-size: 22px; font-weight: 800; font-family: Manrope, sans-serif;\">{{ pphEstimate }}<\u002Fdiv>\n                <div style=\"font-size: 11.5px; color: #A8A29E; margin-top: 6px;\">Dari omzet bulan ini {{ totalIncomeLabel }}<\u002Fdiv>\n              <\u002Fdiv>\n              <div style=\"background: #fff; border: 1px solid #E7E3DC; border-radius: 14px; padding: 18px;\">\n                <div style=\"font-size: 12px; color: #A8A29E; font-weight: 600; text-transform: uppercase; margin-bottom: 8px;\">Estimasi PPN (11%)<\u002Fdiv>\n                <div style=\"font-size: 22px; font-weight: 800; font-family: Manrope, sans-serif;\">{{ ppnEstimate }}<\u002Fdiv>\n                <div style=\"font-size: 11.5px; color: #A8A29E; margin-top: 6px;\">Berlaku jika brand sudah PKP<\u002Fdiv>\n              <\u002Fdiv>\n            <\u002Fdiv>\n            <div style=\"background: #171412; border-radius: 14px; padding: 18px 20px; color: #fff; max-width: 640px; font-size: 13px; line-height: 1.6;\">\n              ℹ️ Estimasi ini disederhanakan untuk UMKM. Konsultasikan ke akuntan/kantor pajak untuk kewajiban pajak yang akurat.\n            <\u002Fdiv>\n          <\u002Fsc-if>\n        <\u002Fsc-if>\n\n        <!-- ===== CREDIT ===== -->\n        <sc-if value=\"{{ pageIsCredit }}\">\n          <div style=\"background: #171412; border-radius: 18px; padding: 30px; margin-bottom: 20px; color: #fff; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between;\">\n            <div>\n              <div style=\"font-size: 12.5px; color: #A8A29E; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: .05em; margin-bottom: 6px;\">Saldo Credit<\u002Fdiv>\n              <div style=\"font-size: 40px; font-weight: 800; font-family: Manrope, sans-serif;\">⚡ {{ creditBalance }}<\u002Fdiv>\n            <\u002Fdiv>\n            <div style=\"display: flex; gap: 8px;\">\n              <sc-for list=\"{{ creditPackages }}\" as=\"pkg\" hint-placeholder-count=\"3\">\n                <button onclick=\"{{ pkg.onBuy }}\" style=\"padding: 14px 18px; border-radius: 12px; border: 1.5px solid #34302C; background: #211D1A; color: #fff; cursor: pointer; text-align: center;\">\n                  <div style=\"font-weight: 800; font-size: 15px;\">{{ pkg.amount }} ⚡<\u002Fdiv>\n                  <div style=\"font-size: 11.5px; color: #A8A29E; margin-top: 2px;\">{{ pkg.price }}<\u002Fdiv>\n                <\u002Fbutton>\n              <\u002Fsc-for>\n            <\u002Fdiv>\n          <\u002Fdiv>\n\n          <div style=\"background: #fff; border: 1px solid #E7E3DC; border-radius: 16px; padding: 20px; margin-bottom: 20px;\">\n            <div style=\"font-weight: 700; font-size: 14.5px; margin-bottom: 12px;\">Tarif Credit per Aksi<\u002Fdiv>\n            <div style=\"display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); gap: 8px;\">\n              <sc-for list=\"{{ creditRatesList }}\" as=\"rt\" hint-placeholder-count=\"6\">\n                <div style=\"display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; padding: 9px 12px; background: #F6F4EF; border-radius: 8px; font-size: 12.5px;\">\n                  <span>{{ rt.name }}<\u002Fspan><span style=\"font-weight: 700;\">{{ rt.cost }} ⚡<\u002Fspan>\n                <\u002Fdiv>\n              <\u002Fsc-for>\n            <\u002Fdiv>\n          <\u002Fdiv>\n\n          <div style=\"background: #fff; border: 1px solid #E7E3DC; border-radius: 16px; padding: 20px;\">\n            <div style=\"font-weight: 700; font-size: 14.5px; margin-bottom: 12px;\">Riwayat Pemakaian<\u002Fdiv>\n            <sc-if value=\"{{ noCreditLog }}\">\n              <div style=\"font-size: 13.5px; color: #A8A29E; padding: 12px 0;\">Belum ada pemakaian credit.<\u002Fdiv>\n            <\u002Fsc-if>\n            <sc-if value=\"{{ hasCreditLog }}\">\n              <div style=\"display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 1px; border: 1px solid #EDEAE3; border-radius: 10px; overflow: hidden;\">\n                <sc-for list=\"{{ creditLogRows }}\" as=\"lg\" hint-placeholder-count=\"1\">\n                  <div style=\"display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; padding: 10px 14px; font-size: 13px; border-top: 1px solid #F1EEE8;\">\n                    <div>{{ lg.actionName }}<\u002Fdiv>\n                    <div style=\"display: flex; gap: 14px; align-items: center;\">\n                      <span style=\"color: #A8A29E; font-size: 12px;\">sisa {{ lg.balanceAfter }}<\u002Fspan>\n                      <span style=\"font-weight: 700; color: #DC2626;\">-{{ lg.cost }} ⚡<\u002Fspan>\n                    <\u002Fdiv>\n                  <\u002Fdiv>\n                <\u002Fsc-for>\n              <\u002Fdiv>\n            <\u002Fsc-if>\n          <\u002Fdiv>\n        <\u002Fsc-if>\n\n      <\u002Fdiv>\n    <\u002Fdiv>\n  <\u002Fsc-if>\n\n  <!-- ===== INSUFFICIENT CREDIT MODAL ===== -->\n  <sc-if value=\"{{ insufficientModal.show }}\">\n    <div style=\"position: fixed; inset: 0; background: rgba(0,0,0,.4); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; z-index: 60;\">\n      <div style=\"background: #fff; border-radius: 18px; padding: 30px; width: 380px; text-align: center;\">\n        <div style=\"font-size: 36px; margin-bottom: 10px;\">⚡<\u002Fdiv>\n        <div style=\"font-weight: 800; font-size: 16px; margin-bottom: 6px;\">Credit kurang<\u002Fdiv>\n        <div style=\"font-size: 13.5px; color: #78716C; margin-bottom: 22px;\">Butuh {{ insufficientModal.needed }} credit, saldo kamu {{ creditBalance }}. Top up sekarang?<\u002Fdiv>\n        <div style=\"display: flex; gap: 8px;\">\n          <button onclick=\"{{ closeInsufficientModal }}\" style=\"flex: 1; padding: 11px; border-radius: 10px; border: 1.5px solid #E7E3DC; background: #fff; font-weight: 600; font-size: 13.5px; cursor: pointer;\">Batal<\u002Fbutton>\n          <button onclick=\"{{ goToCreditFromModal }}\" style=\"flex: 1; padding: 11px; border-radius: 10px; border: none; background: #0D9488; color: #fff; font-weight: 700; font-size: 13.5px; cursor: pointer;\">Top Up<\u002Fbutton>\n        <\u002Fdiv>\n      <\u002Fdiv>\n    <\u002Fdiv>\n  <\u002Fsc-if>\n\n  <sc-if value=\"{{ toast }}\">\n    <div style=\"position: fixed; bottom: 24px; left: 50%; transform: translateX(-50%); background: #171412; color: #fff; padding: 12px 20px; border-radius: 10px; font-size: 13.5px; font-weight: 600; z-index: 70; animation: nwFadeUp .25s ease;\">{{ toast }}<\u002Fdiv>\n  <\u002Fsc-if>\n\n<\u002Fdiv>\n\n<\u002Fx-dc>\n<script type=\"text/x-dc\" data-dc-script=\"\">\nconst CATEGORIES = ['Makanan & Minuman', 'Fashion', 'Kerajinan', 'Jasa', 'Kecantikan', 'Lainnya'];\nconst TONES = [\n  { key: 'santai_ramah', icon: '😄', label: 'Santai & Ramah' },\n  { key: 'profesional', icon: '💼', label: 'Profesional' },\n  { key: 'energik', icon: '🔥', label: 'Enerjik & Bold' },\n  { key: 'hangat', icon: '🤗', label: 'Hangat & Personal' },\n  { key: 'humoris', icon: '😂', label: 'Humoris' },\n  { key: 'edukatif', icon: '🎓', label: 'Edukatif' },\n];\nconst CREDIT_RATES = {\n  'riset.pasar': { cost: 5, name: 'Riset Pasar' },\n  'konten.caption': { cost: 2, name: 'Konten Caption' },\n  'konten.gambar': { cost: 4, name: 'Konten Gambar' },\n  'konten.video': { cost: 6, name: 'Konten Video' },\n  'konten.carousel': { cost: 5, name: 'Konten Carousel' },\n  'toko.ai_chat_reply': { cost: 1, name: 'AI Chat Reply' },\n  'toko.campaign_wa': { cost: 8, name: 'Campaign WA Broadcast' },\n};\nconst TOKO_TABS = [\n  { key: 'dashboard', icon: '📊', label: 'Dashboard' },\n  { key: 'orders', icon: '📦', label: 'Orders' },\n  { key: 'inbox', icon: '💬', label: 'Inbox' },\n  { key: 'inventory', icon: '📈', label: 'Inventory' },\n  { key: 'pelanggan', icon: '🧲', label: 'Pelanggan' },\n];\nconst REPLY_TEMPLATES = [\n  { key: 'harga', title: 'Info Harga', body: 'Halo Kak! Harga produk kami mulai dari...' },\n  { key: 'ongkir', title: 'Info Ongkir', body: 'Ongkir tergantung kota tujuan Kak, boleh tau alamatnya?' },\n  { key: 'toko', title: 'Link Toko Online', body: 'Yuk cek katalog lengkap kami di tokoku.nextwhiz.id/...' },\n  { key: 'bayar', title: 'Cara Pembayaran', body: 'Bisa transfer BCA/BRI atau COD ya Kak.' },\n];\nconst COURIERS = [\n  { key: 'jne', label: 'JNE — Rp 9.000', cost: 9000 },\n  { key: 'jnt', label: 'J&T — Rp 10.000', cost: 10000 },\n  { key: 'sicepat', label: 'SiCepat — Rp 8.500', cost: 8500 },\n];\nconst KEUANGAN_TABS = [\n  { key: 'ringkasan', icon: '📊', label: 'Ringkasan' },\n  { key: 'pengeluaran', icon: '💸', label: 'Pengeluaran' },\n  { key: 'piutang', icon: '🤝', label: 'Piutang & Hutang' },\n  { key: 'labarugi', icon: '📄', label: 'Laba Rugi' },\n  { key: 'pajak', icon: '🧾', label: 'Pajak' },\n];\nconst EXPENSE_CATEGORIES = ['Bahan Baku', 'Operasional', 'Marketing'];\nconst CONTENT_TYPES = [\n  { key: 'caption', icon: '💬', label: 'Caption', rate: 'konten.caption' },\n  { key: 'gambar', icon: '🖼️', label: 'Gambar', rate: 'konten.gambar' },\n  { key: 'video', icon: '🎬', label: 'Video', rate: 'konten.video' },\n  { key: 'carousel', icon: '📑', label: 'Carousel', rate: 'konten.carousel' },\n];\nconst PLATFORMS = ['Instagram', 'TikTok', 'Shopee', 'WhatsApp'];\nconst MEDIA_TYPES = [\n  { key: 'foto', label: '📷 Foto' },\n  { key: 'video', label: '🎬 Video' },\n];\nconst MEDIA_FILTERS = [{ key: 'all', label: 'Semua' }, { key: 'foto', label: '📷 Foto' }, { key: 'video', label: '🎬 Video' }];\n\nfunction fmtRp(n) { return 'Rp ' + Number(n || 0).toLocaleString('id-ID'); }\nfunction uid(prefix) { return prefix + '_' + Math.random().toString(36).slice(2, 8); }\nfunction slugify(s) { return (s || '').toLowerCase().trim().replace(/[^a-z0-9]+/g, '-').replace(/(^-|-$)/g, ''); }\n\nclass Component extends DCLogic {\n  state = {\n    step: 'brand', // brand, product, research-suggest, research-pipeline, app\n    page: 'dashboard',\n    brandForm: { name: '', description: '', category: '' },\n    brand: null,\n\n    products: [],\n    showProductForm: false,\n    productFormType: 'barang',\n    productForm: { name: '', price: '', costPrice: '', stock: '', minStock: '', description: '' },\n\n    researchQuery: '',\n    researches: [],\n    contexts: [],\n    contextUsage: [], // {contextId, usedFor, referenceId}\n    activeResearchId: null,\n    pipelineStepIndex: -1,\n    pipelineTarget: null, // where to go after pipeline completes: 'onboarding' | 'riset'\n\n    toneOfVoice: null,\n    showToneModal: false,\n    contentComposer: { text: '', productId: '', mediaType: 'foto', platform: 'Instagram' },\n    composerExpanded: false,\n    filterMediaType: 'all',\n    filterPlatform: 'all',\n    selectedContentId: null,\n    editingContentId: null,\n    editingBody: '',\n    showAddProductModal: false,\n    addProductForm: { name: '', description: '', price: '', stock: '' },\n    contentGenerating: false,\n    contentLibrary: [],\n\n    leads: [],\n    customers: [],\n    orders: [],\n    payments: [],\n    selectedPaymentOrderId: null,\n    resiEditingOrderId: null,\n    resiInputValue: '',\n    printLabelOrderId: null,\n    chatLog: [],\n    chatDemoRunning: false,\n    tokoTab: 'dashboard',\n    autoReplyEnabled: true,\n    campaigns: [],\n    campaignForm: { name: '', body: '', segment: 'all' },\n\n    transactions: [],\n    keuanganTab: 'ringkasan',\n    expenseForm: { category: 'Bahan Baku', amount: '', description: '' },\n    receivables: [],\n    payables: [],\n    receivableForm: { customerName: '', amount: '', dueDate: '' },\n    payableForm: { supplierName: '', amount: '', dueDate: '' },\n    creditBalance: 50,\n    creditLog: [],\n    insufficientModal: { show: false, needed: 0 },\n    pendingAction: null,\n\n    toast: null,\n  };\n\n  componentDidMount() {\n    this._timers = [];\n  }\n  componentWillUnmount() {\n    (this._timers || []).forEach(clearTimeout);\n  }\n  setTimer(fn, ms) {\n    const t = setTimeout(fn, ms);\n    this._timers.push(t);\n    return t;\n  }\n\n  showToast(msg) {\n    this.setState({ toast: msg });\n    this.setTimer(() => this.setState({ toast: null }), 2200);\n  }\n\n  // ---------- CREDIT ----------\n  chargeCredit(actionKey, referenceId, onSuccess) {\n    const rate = CREDIT_RATES[actionKey];\n    const cost = rate.cost;\n    if (this.state.creditBalance < cost) {\n      this.setState({ insufficientModal: { show: true, needed: cost } });\n      return false;\n    }\n    const balanceAfter = this.state.creditBalance - cost;\n    const logEntry = { id: uid('log'), actionKey, actionName: rate.name, cost, balanceAfter, referenceId, status: 'charged', createdAt: Date.now() };\n    this.setState(s => ({ creditBalance: balanceAfter, creditLog: [logEntry, ...s.creditLog] }));\n    onSuccess();\n    return true;\n  }\n  closeInsufficientModal = () => this.setState({ insufficientModal: { show: false, needed: 0 } });\n  goToCreditFromModal = () => this.setState({ insufficientModal: { show: false, needed: 0 }, page: 'credit', step: 'app' });\n  topUp = (amount) => {\n    this.setState(s => ({ creditBalance: s.creditBalance + amount }));\n    this.showToast(`Top up berhasil! +${amount} credit`);\n  };\n\n  // ---------- BRAND ----------\n  onBrandNameChange = (e) => { const v = e.target.value; this.setState(s => ({ brandForm: { ...s.brandForm, name: v } })); };\n  onBrandDescChange = (e) => { const v = e.target.value; this.setState(s => ({ brandForm: { ...s.brandForm, description: v } })); };\n  selectCategory(cat) { this.setState(s => ({ brandForm: { ...s.brandForm, category: cat } })); }\n  submitBrand = () => {\n    const { name, description, category } = this.state.brandForm;\n    if (!name.trim() || !category) return;\n    const slug = slugify(name);\n    this.setState({\n      brand: { id: uid('b'), name: name.trim(), description, category, slug, toneOfVoice: null },\n      step: 'product',\n    });\n  };\n\n  // ---------- PRODUCT ----------\n  openProductForm(type) {\n    this.setState({ showProductForm: true, productFormType: type, productForm: { name: '', price: '', costPrice: '', stock: '', minStock: '', description: '' } });\n  }\n  onProductNameChange = (e) => { const v = e.target.value; this.setState(s => ({ productForm: { ...s.productForm, name: v } })); };\n  onProductPriceChange = (e) => { const v = e.target.value; this.setState(s => ({ productForm: { ...s.productForm, price: v } })); };\n  onProductCostChange = (e) => { const v = e.target.value; this.setState(s => ({ productForm: { ...s.productForm, costPrice: v } })); };\n  onProductStockChange = (e) => { const v = e.target.value; this.setState(s => ({ productForm: { ...s.productForm, stock: v } })); };\n  onProductMinStockChange = (e) => { const v = e.target.value; this.setState(s => ({ productForm: { ...s.productForm, minStock: v } })); };\n  onProductDescChange = (e) => { const v = e.target.value; this.setState(s => ({ productForm: { ...s.productForm, description: v } })); };\n  cancelProductForm = () => this.setState({ showProductForm: false });\n  saveProductForm = () => {\n    const f = this.state.productForm;\n    const type = this.state.productFormType;\n    if (!f.name.trim() || !f.price) return;\n    if (type === 'barang' && !f.stock) return;\n    if (type === 'jasa' && !f.description.trim()) return;\n    const product = {\n      id: uid('p'), type, name: f.name.trim(),\n      price: Number(f.price) || 0,\n      costPrice: f.costPrice ? Number(f.costPrice) : null,\n      stock: type === 'barang' ? Number(f.stock) || 0 : null,\n      minStock: f.minStock ? Number(f.minStock) : null,\n      description: f.description,\n      isActive: true,\n    };\n    this.setState(s => ({ products: [...s.products, product], showProductForm: false }));\n  };\n  skipProducts = () => this.setState({ step: 'research-suggest' });\n  finishProducts = () => {\n    if (this.state.products.length === 0) return;\n    this.setState({ step: 'research-suggest' });\n  };\n  skipToDashboard = () => this.setState({ step: 'app', page: 'dashboard' });\n  goToContentDirect = () => this.setState({ step: 'app', page: 'konten' });\n\n  // ---------- RESEARCH ----------\n  onResearchQueryChange = (e) => this.setState({ researchQuery: e.target.value });\n  buildSuggestedQueries() {\n    const brand = this.state.brand;\n    if (!brand) return [];\n    const products = this.state.products;\n    if (products.length > 0) {\n      const p = products[0].name;\n      return [`Tren ${p}`, `Harga pasaran ${p}`, `Kompetitor ${p}`];\n    }\n    return [`Tren ${brand.category} 2026`, `Keyword trending ${brand.category}`, `Kompetitor ${brand.category} lokal`];\n  }\n  startResearch(query, target) {\n    if (!query || !query.trim()) return;\n    const cost = CREDIT_RATES['riset.pasar'].cost;\n    if (this.state.creditBalance < cost) {\n      this.setState({ insufficientModal: { show: true, needed: cost } });\n      return;\n    }\n    this.setState({ researchQuery: query, step: target === 'onboarding' ? 'research-pipeline' : this.state.step, page: target === 'riset' ? 'riset' : this.state.page, pipelineTarget: target, pipelineStepIndex: 0 });\n    this.runPipeline(query, target);\n  }\n  runPipeline(query, target) {\n    const steps = 6;\n    const advance = (i) => {\n      this.setTimer(() => {\n        if (i < steps) {\n          this.setState({ pipelineStepIndex: i });\n          advance(i + 1);\n        } else {\n          this.completeResearch(query, target);\n        }\n      }, 480);\n    };\n    advance(0);\n  }\n  completeResearch(query, target) {\n    const cost = CREDIT_RATES['riset.pasar'].cost;\n    const balanceAfter = this.state.creditBalance - cost;\n    const brand = this.state.brand;\n    const researchId = uid('r');\n    const result = this.generateResearchResult(query, brand);\n    const research = { id: researchId, query, result, createdAt: Date.now() };\n\n    const kontenCtxId = uid('ctx');\n    const tokoCtxId = uid('ctx');\n    const keuanganCtxId = uid('ctx');\n    const contexts = [\n      { id: kontenCtxId, researchId, targetModule: 'konten', json: result.kontenContext },\n      { id: tokoCtxId, researchId, targetModule: 'toko', json: result.tokoContext },\n      { id: keuanganCtxId, researchId, targetModule: 'keuangan', json: result.keuanganContext },\n    ];\n    const logEntry = { id: uid('log'), actionKey: 'riset.pasar', actionName: 'Riset Pasar', cost, balanceAfter, referenceId: researchId, status: 'charged', createdAt: Date.now() };\n\n    this.setState(s => ({\n      researches: [research, ...s.researches],\n      contexts: [...s.contexts, ...contexts],\n      creditBalance: balanceAfter,\n      creditLog: [logEntry, ...s.creditLog],\n      activeResearchId: researchId,\n      step: target === 'onboarding' ? 'app' : s.step,\n      page: 'riset',\n      pipelineStepIndex: -1,\n    }));\n    this.showToast('Riset selesai! 3 rekomendasi aksi baru tersedia.');\n  }\n  generateResearchResult(query, brand) {\n    const cat = brand ? brand.category : 'Makanan & Minuman';\n    const productName = this.state.products[0] ? this.state.products[0].name : (cat + ' unggulan');\n    return {\n      personas: [\n        { name: 'Anak Kos Hemat', demo: '18-24 th, mahasiswa', platform: 'TikTok', pain: 'budget jajan terbatas' },\n        { name: 'Ibu Muda Praktis', demo: '25-35 th, kerja/ibu rumah tangga', platform: 'Instagram & WA', pain: 'cari cemilan cepat & enak' },\n        { name: 'Pecinta Pedas Ekstrem', demo: '20-30 th, pekerja kantoran', platform: 'TikTok & Shopee', pain: 'susah cari level pedas asli' },\n      ],\n      swot: [\n        { label: 'STRENGTH', text: 'Rasa khas rumahan, harga kompetitif dibanding brand nasional.' },\n        { label: 'WEAKNESS', text: 'Belum ada kehadiran marketplace yang kuat.' },\n        { label: 'OPPORTUNITY', text: `Permintaan \"${query}\" naik, terutama di TikTok Shop.` },\n        { label: 'THREAT', text: 'Kompetitor besar rutin diskon agresif.' },\n      ],\n      competitors: [\n        { name: 'Maicih', price: 'Rp 18.000', social: 'Tinggi', threat: 'Tinggi', threatLevel: 'high' },\n        { name: 'Basreng Kekinian', price: 'Rp 12.000', social: 'Sedang', threat: 'Sedang', threatLevel: 'med' },\n        { name: 'Kripik Lokal X', price: 'Rp 13.500', social: 'Rendah', threat: 'Rendah', threatLevel: 'low' },\n      ],\n      keywords: ['#pedasbanget', '#cemilansiang', '#jajananmurah', '#anakkos', '#tiktokfood', '#umkmlokal'],\n      trend: [42, 48, 55, 61, 70, 82],\n      priceRecommendation: `Harga pasar untuk kategori sejenis di kisaran Rp 12.000–18.000. Rekomendasi: jaga harga ${productName} di Rp 13.500–15.000 dan tambah stok +20 pcs untuk antisipasi lonjakan permintaan musiman.`,\n      kontenContext: {\n        researchQuery: query,\n        angle: 'Berani coba level pedas ekstrem?',\n        platform: 'TikTok',\n        recommendations: [\n          { judul: 'Tantangan Level Pedas', platform: 'TikTok', angle: 'Berani coba level 3?' },\n          { judul: 'Cemilan Hemat Anak Kos', platform: 'Instagram', angle: 'Rp 10rb udah rame-rame' },\n        ],\n      },\n      tokoContext: { hargaPasar: 'Rp 12.000–18.000', produkTrending: 'keripik pedas level 3, basreng original' },\n      keuanganContext: {\n        skenario: `Turunkan harga ${productName} 10%`,\n        marginSebelum: '40%',\n        marginSesudah: '33%',\n        kesimpulan: 'Margin turun tapi laba absolut naik karena volume +25-30%.',\n      },\n    };\n  }\n  markContextUsed(contextId, usedFor, referenceId) {\n    this.setState(s => ({ contextUsage: [...s.contextUsage, { contextId, usedFor, referenceId, createdAt: Date.now() }] }));\n  }\n  isContextUsed(contextId) { return this.state.contextUsage.some(u => u.contextId === contextId); }\n  latestContextFor(module) {\n    const ctxs = this.state.contexts.filter(c => c.targetModule === module);\n    return ctxs.length ? ctxs[ctxs.length - 1] : null;\n  }\n  unusedContexts() { return this.state.contexts.filter(c => !this.isContextUsed(c.id)); }\n\n  // ---------- NAV ----------\n  goTo(page) { this.setState({ page }); }\n  goToToko = () => this.setState({ page: 'toko', tokoTab: 'dashboard' });\n  applyRecommendation(ctx) {\n    this.markContextUsed(ctx.id, ctx.targetModule, ctx.id);\n    this.setState({ page: ctx.targetModule === 'konten' ? 'konten' : ctx.targetModule });\n    this.showToast('Rekomendasi diterapkan!');\n  }\n\n  // ---------- CONTENT ----------\n  openToneModalIfNeeded() {\n    if (!this.state.toneOfVoice) this.setState({ showToneModal: true });\n  }\n  selectTone(key) { this.setState({ toneOfVoice: key }); }\n  confirmTone = () => {\n    if (!this.state.toneOfVoice) this.setState({ toneOfVoice: 'santai_ramah' });\n    this.setState({ showToneModal: false });\n  };\n\n  onComposerTextChange = (e) => { const v = e.target.value; this.setState(s => ({ contentComposer: { ...s.contentComposer, text: v } })); };\n  expandComposer = () => this.setState({ composerExpanded: true });\n  collapseComposer = () => this.setState({ composerExpanded: false });\n  selectComposerProduct(id) { this.setState(s => ({ contentComposer: { ...s.contentComposer, productId: id } })); }\n  selectComposerMediaType(key) { this.setState(s => ({ contentComposer: { ...s.contentComposer, mediaType: key } })); }\n  selectComposerPlatform(p) { this.setState(s => ({ contentComposer: { ...s.contentComposer, platform: p } })); }\n\n  submitComposer = () => {\n    const form = this.state.contentComposer;\n    if (!form.text.trim() || !form.productId) return;\n    if (!this.state.toneOfVoice) { this.setState({ showToneModal: true }); return; }\n    const rateKey = form.mediaType === 'video' ? Mawar No. ${Math.floor(1 + Math.random() * 98)}`,\n          sourceChannel: channel, createdAt: Date.now(), lastContactedAt: Date.now() - (backdated ? 4 * 24 * 3600 * 1000 : 0),\n        }],\n      }));\n    }, 2400);\n    push('ai', `Siap Kak, ongkir ke Bandung Rp 12.000. Total ${fmtRp(product.price * 2 + 12000)}. Transfer ke BCA 123456xxxx a.n Ani.`, 2700);\n\n    this.setTimer(() => {\n      this.setState({ chatDemoRunning: false });\n      this.showToast('Lead baru masuk: ' + name);\n    }, 3300);\n  };\n  markLeadLost(leadId) {\n    this.setState(s => ({ leads: s.leads.map(l => l.id === leadId ? { ...l, stage: 'closed' } : l) }));\n    this.showToast('Lead ditandai hilang');\n  }\n  markLeadDeal(leadId) {\n    const lead = this.state.leads.find(l => l.id === leadId);\n    if (!lead) return;\n    const product = this.state.products.find(p => p.id === lead.productId) || this.state.products[0];\n    const custId = uid('cust');\n    const orderId = uid('o');\n    const paymentId = uid('pay');\n    const total = product ? product.price * lead.qty + 12000 : 42000;\n    const receiptColors = ['#F0FBF9', '#FFF6EC', '#F6F4EF', '#EFF6FF'];\n    this.setState(s => ({\n      leads: s.leads.map(l => l.id === leadId ? { ...l, stage: 'deal' } : l),\n      customers: [...s.customers, { id: custId, name: lead.name, phone: lead.phone, totalOrders: 0, totalSpent: 0 }],\n      orders: [...s.orders, {\n        id: orderId, customerId: custId, customerName: lead.name, customerPhone: lead.phone,\n        address: `${lead.street || 'Jl. [{ productId: product.id, name: product.name, qty: lead.qty, price: product.price }] : [],\n        total, status: 'Baru', isJasa: product ? product.type === 'jasa' : false,\n        resi: null, courier: null, shippingCost: null,\n        createdAt: Date.now(), createdAtDate: new Date().toISOString().slice(0, 10),\n      }],\n      payments: [...s.payments, { id: paymentId, orderId, customerName: lead.name, amount: total, method: 'Transfer Bank', status: 'Menunggu', createdAt: Date.now(), receiptColor: receiptColors[Math.floor(Math.random() * receiptColors.length)] }],\n    }));\n    this.showToast(lead.name + ' → Deal! 'Selesai' : 'Diproses';\n\n    this.setState(s => ({\n      payments: s.payments.map(p => p.id === paymentId ? { ...p, status: 'Diterima' } : p),\n      orders: s.orders.map(o => o.id === order.id ? { ...o, status: newOrderStatus } : o),\n      transactions: [{\n        id: uid('t'), type: 'income', category: 'Penjualan', amount: order.total, costAmount,\n        description: `Order ${order.customerName} — ${item ?
